race.comment: TILL DUSK (12) is a former Victorian who has come back to racing further improved. Presents off two second placings at Doomben and has a key jockey switch to Ben Thompson. She has upside and from a handy gate can stalk the speed. The one they have to beat. RETAINER (10) won a 65 by a space at Rockhampton and then had strong support again when disappointing this track/trip. Prepared to forgive that and she tumbles in weight this grade with a 3kg claim atop. That brings her right into it. KATDEEL (3) has been racing over a mile in stronger. Went well here two back before a plainer effort when in the market at Eagle Farm (vet cleared). Carries a lot more weight at this level, but can't be ruled out. SIZZLING GAL (6) can show more third up and would be around the mark finding something like her best.
